layout_notes: Strictly symmetrical about a central longitudinal axis
Courtyard side (front) with semi-circular portico and steps
Garden side (rear) with curved terrace and steps
Central axis: courtyard → peristyle → grand salon → garden
Left wing: bedroom, antechamber, cabinet, assembly room
Right wing: dining room, billiard room, social room, cabinet
Service spaces (office, garderobe) tucked in secondary zones
Grand staircases in both wings leading to the first floor
assumptions: 1 toise = 1949 mm, giving overall main block 35082 x 21439 mm
Two main storeys (ground and first) with 4500 mm floor-to-floor height
Semi-circular portico radius 6000 mm, terrace radius 5000 mm, approximated as polygons
Mixed structural system: load-bearing stone walls and classical columns
Column grid spacing estimated at 3000 mm (x) and 4000 mm (y)
No elevators (18th-century building); two symmetrical main stairs and one service stair
Element counts are approximate for a building of this scale and program
